features: BRIGHTEN AND BALANCE YOUR SKIN; Discover the power of sakura extract and arbutin with our Japanese face mask designed to illuminate and even out your complexion; This brightening face mask works to fade the look of dullness and discoloration, revealing a smoother, more radiant glow; Refresh your routine with a premium sheet mask from VSHELL that transforms tired skin with a luminous, healthy looking glow

TARGET DARK SPOTS WITH CARE; VSHELL’s hydrating face mask is infused with powerful brightening agents that help suppress excess melanin production for a more even skin tone; Each mask in our face mask set works to gradually fade the appearance of dark spots while nourishing your skin with essential moisture; Trusted by face masks beauty experts, this gentle treatment reveals a clearer, more luminous complexion with every use

PURE HYDRATION; This brightening facial mask set is carefully crafted without alcohol, delivering deep hydration without irritation; Our sheet masks infuse the skin with moisture to leave it feeling soft, refreshed, and balanced after every session; Elevate your face mask skincare routine with a treatment that soothes and restores without compromise

VISIBLY BRIGHTER, CLEARER SKIN; Each moisturising face mask targets hyperpigmentation to promote a more even, luminous complexion over time; This ultra soft face mask sheet set delivers active brightening ingredients deep into the skin to help fade stubborn discoloration; Transform your self care with face treatments & masks designed to reveal radiant skin

BRIGHTEN YOUR SKIN THE SMARTER WAY; Say goodbye to your old Korean face mask and upgrade to a full 10 mask set of VSHELL’s advanced sheet face masks; Designed to deliver consistent results, we’ve included enough for a complete course that helps gradually even out skin tone, boost radiance, and restore clarity; Transform your beauty routine with skincare face masks that work in harmony to reveal a lighter, healthier complexion

specifications_table.Special features: ‎Dark Spot Reduction: Formulated to effectively target and fade dark spots, hyperpigmentation, and uneven skin tone, helping to achieve a clearer and more uniform appearance., Melanin Suppression: Designed to inhibit melanin production, this mask helps prevent future discoloration, ensuring long-lasting skin brightness and an even skin tone., Deep Hydration: Provides intense hydration to nourish and revitalize the skin, leaving it feeling soft, smooth, and rejuvenated after each use., Brightening Formula: Infused with powerful Sakura extract and Arbutin, this facial mask enhances skin radiance and brightness, promoting a luminous and vibrant complexion., Convenient Packaging: Each pack contains 10 easy-to-use mask sheets, making it simple to incorporate this effective whitening mask into your daily skincare routine for consistent results.
